convention: anthropics/skills/skill-creator evals.json — trigger-only fixture per references/schemas.md. Each entry carries `should_trigger` so skill-creator's description-optimisation loop can score train/held-out trigger accuracy.
notes: Positives target greenfield re-frame2 bootstrap (empty dir, or shadow-cljs project with no re-frame2 wiring). Negatives target authoring on a working v2 project, v1 migration, live-runtime, or 'adding re-frame2 to an existing non-trivial app' (which is authoring, not setup).

evals.name: start-from-nothing
evals.prompt: Start me a new re-frame2 ClojureScript project from an empty directory. I want deps.edn, shadow-cljs.edn, and a counter that mounts.

evals.name: scaffold-cmd
evals.prompt: Scaffold a re-frame2 app for me.

evals.name: hello-world
evals.prompt: I want a hello-world re-frame2 app — what's the minimum wiring?

evals.name: add-to-empty-cljs
evals.prompt: I have an empty CLJS project (shadow-cljs.edn exists, no re-frame2 yet). Add re-frame2 + Reagent and walk me to a working counter.

evals.name: fresh-build-fail
evals.prompt: Just created a fresh re-frame2 project from your template and the build fails: 'No such namespace: re-frame.adapter.reagent'. What did I miss?

evals.name: uix-greenfield
evals.prompt: Bootstrap a new re-frame2 project using the UIx adapter.

evals.name: new-app
evals.prompt: Set up a brand-new re-frame2 application from scratch — deps, shadow-cljs config, index.html, entry namespace, the works.

evals.name: first-counter-mounts
evals.prompt: I need a minimal re-frame2 shape that compiles under `shadow-cljs watch` and mounts a counter. Nothing more.

evals.name: neg-author-on-working
evals.prompt: Write a re-frame2 reg-event-fx for posting a login form on my existing project.
evals.rationale: Authoring on a working v2 project is re-frame2.

evals.name: neg-add-to-nontrivial
evals.prompt: I have an existing CLJS app with Mount + reagent and a bunch of custom state management. Add re-frame2 to it.
evals.rationale: Adding re-frame2 to a non-trivial existing app is authoring (per skills/README.md disqualifier), not greenfield setup.

evals.name: neg-migration
evals.prompt: I want to migrate my re-frame v1 app to re-frame2.

evals.name: neg-live-pair
evals.prompt: Attach to my running re-frame2 app and tell me what's in app-db.

evals.name: neg-port-language
evals.prompt: I want to port re-frame2 to TypeScript. Where do I start?

evals.name: neg-spec-rationale
evals.prompt: Why does re-frame2 default to Reagent over UIx?
evals.rationale: Spec / design rationale belongs to SKILL-REDIRECT.md.

evals.name: neg-improver
evals.prompt: Review my re-frame2 events.cljs for anti-patterns.

evals.name: neg-vocab-scaffold
evals.rationale: Vocabulary hit ('scaffold') on a different framework.
